description.from: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 529*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+330.6% ATK 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.
description.to: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 1159*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+188.1% ATK 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

description.from: Grants all allies a shield that absorbs 1080*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+675.6% ATK damage for 7 sec. While the shield lasts, the target’s ATK increases by 25%, Healing Power by 65%, and Status Resistance by 600.
description.to: Grants a shield to 4 ally with the highest damage dealt, absorbing 795*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+129% ATK damage for 16 sec. While the shield is active, Healing Rate increases by 11% and CC Resistance increases by 100.

description.from: Deals 177*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+110.8% ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6 times, then inflicts Blind for 3.5 sec, and increases Magic DMG taken by 25% for 10 sec. This skill applies Critical Rate 500 higher.
description.to: Deals 177*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 110.8% of ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for 2sec. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of 800.

description.from:
Magic DMG taken is reduced by 15%.
At the start of each battle or every 14 sec, restores 15% of Max HP to the 1 allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF by 60*(1+0.3*Skill Level) for 7 sec.
description.to: For 15 sec, heals 2 allies with the lowest current HP for 1.5% of Max HP 10 times, and increases Magic DEF by 157+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient).

dark.from: Healed allies take 25% less Magic DMG for 10 sec.
dark.to: Healed allies take 40% less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 1000 and damage increases by 80%.
light.to: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.

dark.from: Changes the target to random enemies.
dark.to: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.

light.from: Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by 40% for the duration of Skill.
light.to: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle.

dark.to: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%.

description.from: [Heaven’s Vengeance] increases the target’s M.DMG taken by 20% for 10 sec and extends Blind duration by {0} sec.
description.to: [Heaven's Vengeance] changes the attack target to a random target and increases Blind duration by {0} sec.

description.from: Every 8 sec, heals the 4 allies with the lowest current HP by {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by 200, and Critical DMG by {1}% for 8 sec.
description.to: Every 8sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest current HP for {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate by 160 and Critical DMG by {1}% of 4 allies with the highest ATK for 8 sec.
